message:
fix(agent): guard stream deltas against missing Start event and add content-index gap-filling

Race condition fix:
- Delta/content events arriving before (or without) a StreamEvent::Start
  would corrupt the previous assistant message by appending to it instead
  of creating a new one
- Add seed_partial_message_if_missing() that lazily creates an empty
  assistant message placeholder when added_partial is false
- Insert guard calls before every delta handler: TextDelta, TextStop,
  ThinkingStart, ThinkingDelta, ThinkingStop, ToolCallStart,
  ToolCallDelta, ToolCallEnd

Content-index gap-filling:
- When content_index == msg.content.len() but the slot doesn't exist,
  push a placeholder block instead of panicking on out-of-bounds access
- StreamEvent::Start path now reuses an existing partial message when
  added_partial is already true, preventing duplicate empty messages

Test:
- New delta_without_start_does_not_mutate_previous_message test with
  DeltaOnlyProvider that emits deltas without a Start event, verifying
  the previous message remains untouched

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
